title.en: In an instant, Ye Tian copied this ultimate tal...

content.en:
"This guy is crazy enough to run to the Beast of the Night. "

"I guess I know that I can't get out, and I don't want to live!"

"Let's go quickly, don't be implicated by him!"

These Nine Realms pinnacle beings quickly fled, away from the Beasts of the Eternal Night.

And Ye Tian quickly approached the Beast of the Eternal Night, and the copying talent quickly touched the other party.

Sure enough, he sensed the ultimate talent of the Beast of the Eternal Night—the Talent of the Eternal Night!

"Copy!"

In an instant, Ye Tian copied this ultimate talent.

And at this moment, the Beast of the Eternal Night also sensed Ye Tian, and directly spat out a black light and killed Ye Tian, this power contained a terrifying killing power, and even carried the power of the Abyss of Eternal Night.

Ye Tian couldn't resist the power of this Eternal Night Beast at all, he was now facing not just a Beast of the Eternal Night, but the entire Abyss of Eternal Night, how could he resist this?

Burst!

His body was pierced, and then the remnants were swallowed by the Beast of the Eternal Night, but Ye Tian also disbanded this replica body as soon as possible.

......

Beyond the Abyss of Eternal Night.

Ye Tian's copy body was still guarding here, sensing that his copy body was killed, he didn't panic at all, and continued to condense a copy body.

Wow!

This copy body entered the Abyss of Eternal Night, so that the other powerhouses mistakenly believed that he had not been eaten by the Beast of the Eternal Night, but left in the other direction in time.

"The next step is to merge the Eternal Night talent. "

Ye Tian began to fuse.

He's fused a lot of ultimate talent, and now he can easily bear it.

Soon, he succeeded in fusing the Eternal Night Talent at the ultimate talent level.

However, since the Beast of the Night has not yet left, he cannot go to the Stone of the Eternal Night for the time being.

......

The Abyss of Eternal Night.

Some of the Nine Realms pinnacle existences gathered together, but they didn't fight, but they were discussing the matter of the Beast of the Eternal Night.

Ye Tian soon came here, and several Nine Realms peak powerhouses were very curious when they saw that Ye Tian was still alive.

"Didn't you rush to the beast of the eternal night?"

A Nine Realms peak asked curiously.

"I ran away and didn't really rush over, I was just curious about what the Beast of the Night looked like, and I didn't dare to actually go there. "

Ye Tian explained it like this, and those Nine Realm Peaks also believed it, and they didn't dwell on this issue.

At this moment, they were discussing how to use the Beast of the Eternal Night to leave the Abyss of the Night.

"Ladies and gentlemen, the Beast of the Eternal Night can definitely leave the Abyss of the Night, and if we are swallowed by the Beast of the Night, and do not die, we can go out when the Beast of the Eternal Night is out. "

"It's a good idea, but if you want to be swallowed by the beasts of the eternal night and not die, you can't do it. The Beast of the Eternal Night is too powerful, we can't be an opponent, and we will definitely be killed by the opponent in an instant. "

"Continue to improve your strength, maybe it's possible!"

"Hahaha, you are crazy, if you want to be swallowed by the beast of the eternal night and not die, then we may be able to get out ourselves, and we still need to use the beast of the eternal night? Forget it, let's sleep, maybe one day the abyss of eternal night will be shattered, and we can get out. "

"Sleep, how long can you sleep? You will still wake up early in the evening, and after sleeping many times, you will still go crazy, hahaha, everyone has to die!"

"Then I'll kill you first!"

Bang!!!!!

This group of crazy people discussed and discussed, and they were killed.

Ye Tian left quickly, but he didn't want to fight them.

"Sure enough, they were all crazy people, and they were all delirious. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

This can't be blamed on them, after all, they don't know how many endless years they have been trapped here, maybe they have lived longer than many Ultimate Realm Lords, countless years of despair have accumulated together, they will naturally go crazy, and there is always a glimmer of hope, so they did not commit suicide.

Time passed slowly, and the Beast of the Eternal Night stayed with the Stone of the Eternal Night for a long time before leaving.

And not long after the Eternal Night Beast left, Ye Tian returned to the Eternal Night Stone and continued to comprehend the ultimate rules of the Eternal Night.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to comprehend the Sixfold Eternal Night Ultimate Rule, an efficiency that he didn't dare to imagine in the past.

I have to say that with the Eternal Night Ultimate Talent and the Eternal Night Stone, it is too easy for him to improve the Eternal Night Ultimate Rules.

Time flies.

Another long time has passed.

With the help of the Eternal Night Ultimate Talent and the Eternal Night Stone, Ye Tian finally raised the Eternal Night Ultimate Rule to the Ninefold Realm.

Just when the Eternal Night Ultimate Rule broke through to the ninth level, Ye Tian's Eternal Night Ultimate Body broke through to the Perfection Realm.

His physical fitness has improved a lot, but he is still not as strong as the Extreme Body of Yuanxing.

But the main advantage of the Ultimate Body of the Eternal Night is speed!

Swish!

As soon as Ye Tian's mind moved, his speed was extremely fast, and with the Eternal Night Ultimate Rule, his current combat power was extremely terrifying.

Now, those Nine Realm Peaks here are far from being his opponents.

"I wonder if I can rush out with my current strength?"

Ye Tian tried, but he still couldn't get rid of the abyss of eternal night, and the attempt failed.

"Sure enough, the Eternal Night Ultimate Rule of the Ninefold Realm is still not good, but the Ninefold Realm is already the limit, and it is impossible to raise the Ninefold Ultimate Rule to the Tenfold Realm before breaking through to become the Ultimate Realm Master, no wonder those guys are desperate. "

Ye Tian muttered.

Since the Eternal Night (Zhao Zhao Hao) Ultimate Rule has reached the Ninefold Realm, and the Eternal Night Ultimate Body is complete, if he raises the Ultimate Will to a certain level, he will be qualified to impact the Ultimate Realm.

However, it is very dangerous to impact the Ultimate Realm, and once he fails, he will completely fall, and he is not in a hurry to impact the Ultimate Realm.

He wants to improve all aspects to the extreme, and when the time comes, he will have enough confidence to hit the ultimate realm.

In terms of ultimate will, the improvement is very slow, maybe you can study the ultimate system of the subterfuge domain, this ultimate system helps to improve the ultimate will.

Although the Eternal Night Stone could not help Ye Tian improve the Eternal Night Ultimate Rule, it still helped to improve the Eternal Night Ultimate Rule.

So, he continued to stay here and meditate, and let the efficiency be slower.

......

The demon on the other side.

Void Heaven Palace.

Ye Tianlai asked Lord Duomi, and wanted to inquire about the ultimate system of the Secret Domain.
